title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAILEN IN THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 14324 / 62 OG No. 27, 4764 (July 4, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4346, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BAILEN IN THE PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF GENERAL EMILIO AGUINALDO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Bailen in the Province of Cavite is hereby changed to the Municipality of General Emilio Aguinaldo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
